name: 001_h_command_line_symlink_dir.sh
exercises: -H follows symlink starting points to directories
expected: child file under command-line symlink directory is found

name: 002_l_follows_symlink_dir.sh
expected: regular file reachable only through symlinked directory is printed

name: 003_p_reports_symlink_itself.sh
expected: symlink matches -type l

name: 004_d_help_lists_debug_options.sh
expected: debug help output names valid debug arguments

name: 005_o3_preserves_query_result.sh
expected: only .txt regular files are printed

name: 006_default_expression_prints_startpoint.sh
exercises: default expression when no expression is given
expected: starting file path is printed

name: 007_maxdepth_zero_only_startpoint.sh
expected: only the starting point is processed

name: 008_mindepth_one_skips_startpoint.sh
expected: depth-1 child is printed but starting point is not

name: 009_depth_processes_contents_first.sh
expected: file is printed before containing directories

name: 010_files0_from_reads_startpoints.sh
expected: both listed starting files are processed

name: 011_files0_from_empty_name_errors.sh
expected: find exits nonzero

name: 012_files0_from_with_path_errors.sh
exercises: -files0-from is mutually exclusive with command-line paths
expected: find exits nonzero

name: 013_missing_startpoint_errors.sh
expected: find exits nonzero

name: 014_follow_makes_lname_false.sh
expected: resolved symlink is not matched by -lname

name: 015_name_pattern_matches_leading_dot.sh
expected: *.c matches both plain.c and .hidden.c

name: 016_iname_case_insensitive.sh
expected: Foo and foo both match pattern foo

name: 017_ipath_case_insensitive_whole_path.sh
expected: sub/File matches uppercase absolute path pattern

name: 018_regextype_posix_extended.sh
expected: only foo123 matches the POSIX extended whole-path regex

name: 019_type_combined_list.sh
expected: regular file, directory, and symlink entries all match

name: 020_empty_files_and_directories.sh
stderr: -empty did not match exactly empty files and directories
expected: empty regular file and empty directory match

name: 021_size_bytes_exact.sh
expected: only the three-byte file matches -size 3c

name: 022_perm_all_bits.sh
expected: files with all 664 bits, including extra bits, match

name: 023_newer_reference_mtime.sh
expected: only file newer than reference is printed

name: 024_newermt_direct_time.sh
expected: only file modified after the direct time is printed

name: 025_samefile_hard_link.sh
expected: original and hard link both match

name: 026_print0_outputs_nul_terminator.sh
expected: output bytes are path followed by ASCII NUL

name: 027_printf_basename_and_size.sh
expected: basename and byte size are printed exactly

name: 028_fprint_truncates_and_writes_file.sh
expected: output file contains the matched path

name: 029_execdir_runs_in_file_directory.sh
expected: command observes working directory as matched file's directory

name: 030_delete_nonempty_directory_errors.sh
expected: find exits nonzero
